overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player character moves from a covered pedestrian plaza beneath elevated highways, through debris-filled corridors, and emerges onto a busy city street with vehicle traffic and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza beneath elevated highway with neon signage

events.description: turning right to move deeper under the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking through wet pavement reflecting green neon lights, then turning right under the overpass

entered.detail: bright green neon sign with 'CYBER' text on building facade
large illuminated advertisement screen showing pink and white graphics
massive concrete overpass with fluorescent lighting underneath
tall modern building with reflective glass windows visible in distance
reflective wet ground surface mirroring the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered urban plaza beneath an elevated highway, dominated by a bright green neon sign and wet pavement reflecting the artificial lights. The camera moves forward then turns right, passing under the massive concrete overpass structure with a large digital billboard visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with concrete planters and benches under overpass

events.description: entering area with concrete planters and benches lining the walkway
group of pedestrians in yellow jackets comes into view walking ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through a pedestrian area with planters on the right, passing by pedestrians and neon shop signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking toward the camera
pedestrian walking past on the right side

entered.detail: large rectangular planters containing green bushes and vegetation
concrete and metal benches for seating along the walkway
multiple colorful neon signs for various shops and businesses
linear fluorescent tube lights mounted under the highway structure

segments.scene_description: Moving through a semi-covered walkway lined with concrete planters and benches on the right, the scene features moderate pedestrian traffic including figures in distinctive yellow jackets. Neon shop signs illuminate the left side while overhead fluorescent lights provide additional lighting under the highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed corridor with debris leading to street exit

events.description: entering darker corridor with red emergency lighting and scattered debris
approaching bright exit opening to the main city street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a debris-filled corridor with trash and newspapers scattered on the ground, heading toward a bright exit

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the street exit

entered.detail: scattered newspapers and trash littering the concrete floor
green neon 'OPEN' sign on shop door
low concrete seating structures along the left wall
closed metal roll-down shutters for storefronts

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a darker, enclosed corridor with red emergency lighting and debris scattered across the ground. The camera moves past closed shop shutters and concrete benches toward a bright exit, following a group of pedestrians ahead while navigating through the littered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with vehicle traffic and elevated walkways

events.description: exiting enclosed corridor onto open city street with vehicle traffic visible
black vehicle passes by on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk next to a busy street with moving traffic, passing by railings and tall buildings

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: green metal barriers separating sidewalk from the street
paved street with lane markings for vehicle traffic
black sedan driving on the road with headlights on
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
tall building facade covered with multiple illuminated billboards and signs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor onto an open city street, the scene reveals a bustling urban environment with vehicle traffic on the right and towering skyscrapers ahead. The camera walks along a sidewalk bordered by metal guardrails, passing under an elevated pedestrian walkway while neon advertisements illuminate the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit urban plaza into the expansive brightness of a bustling futuristic city street. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where wet pavement reflects a bright green neon sign, moving forward and turning right past a large digital billboard. As the camera proceeds through a semi-covered walkway, the environment fills with pedestrians in yellow jackets and the glow of fluorescent overhead lights before shifting into a darker, enclosed corridor defined by red emergency lighting and scattered debris. The scene then opens as the camera follows a group of people toward a bright exit, finally emerging from the shadows onto a wide sidewalk bordered by metal guardrails. This transition reveals a towering cityscape of skyscrapers and active vehicle traffic, all illuminated by the vivid glare of surrounding neon advertisements.
